title: prizo #4249
definition:
1) to saw, to cut in two with a saw

 To be "sawn asunder" was a kind of punishment among the Hebrews,
 which according to tradition was inflicted on the prophet Isaiah
nasbUsage:

 To be "sawn asunder" was a kind of punishment among the Hebrews,
 which according to tradition was inflicted on the prophet Isaiah
